title: Interoception and alcohol: Mechanisms, networks, and implications.

assets.abstract: Interoception refers to the perception of the internal state of the body and is increasingly being recognized as an important factor in mental health disorders. Drugs of abuse produce powerful interoceptive states that are upstream of behaviors that drive and influence drug intake, and addiction pathology is impacted by interoceptive processes. The goal of the present review is to discuss interoceptive processes related to alcohol. We will cover physiological responses to alcohol, how interocept

phase_mapping.bridge_rationale: Interoception — visceral perception, cardiac interoception, insula, vagal signaling, felt aliveness.
